== Notes for [[Item:Q2404|Q2404]] ==

{geni:about_me} http://www.gloriousindia.com/history/dynasties/ikshvaku/index.html
<p>http://www.gloriousindia.com/history/dynasties/ikshvaku/prithu.html</p>

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
6707A5D5452C51EFBBFC9A22EF79916B7017


[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
